slides.title: Business overview

perimeter.label: Transaction perimeter
perimeter.subLabel: Entities under FDD scope of work

overviewBody: Everlink Payment Services Inc. ("Everlink") provides payment solutions to financial institutions across Canada.
Mobile payments and gateway services support transaction processing, settlement, and reporting.
Card issuance and ATM managed services provide infrastructure and operational support.
Fraud management and digital solutions support real-time risk controls and payment use cases.
Growth has been supported by volume expansion across core channels.
slides.source: Source: Audited financial statements and management information.
slides.note: Note: Legal ownership percentages shown as at reporting date.
